name: MSSP - OS - MS - 24 - L - Windows domain Account ID Created
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event matches Event ID is any of 4720
when Domain not equals Hostname (custom)
when at least 1 events are seen with the same Subject (custom) in 5 minutes
thresholds: when at least 1 events are seen with the same Subject (custom) in 5 minutes
TD_list: APPLY MSSP - OS - MS - 24 - L - Windows domain Account ID Created on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event matches Event ID is any of 4720
AND when Domain not equals Hostname (custom)
AND when at least 1 events are seen with the same Subject (custom) in 5 minutes
RED_list: Event name: Windows Account ID Created
Add the "Account Name" of the event or flow payload to the Reference Set "MSSP - OS - MS - 01 - M - User Account Created"
